note: Example state shape for the Hermes GitHub Autopilot. Real mutable state should be stored outside the repository checkout, not committed back to the repo.

idempotency.issue: Resume if an active entry exists for the issue.
idempotency.branch: Fetch and reuse an existing remote branch instead of creating a duplicate.
idempotency.pull_request: Attach to an existing open PR that references the issue or branch.
idempotency.claim_comment: Update the existing Hermes claim comment instead of creating a second claim.
idempotency.auto_merge: Do not re-arm auto-merge if GitHub already reports it enabled.
